scripts.dev: npm run sync:env && npm run build -w @nwrma/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:field: npm run sync:env && npm run build -w @nwrma/shared && concurrently -n server,web,tunnel -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web" "node scripts/tunnel-api.mjs"
scripts.dev:field:lan: node scripts/free-port.mjs 3000 && npm run sync:env && npm run build -w @nwrma/shared && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.start:present: node scripts/free-port.mjs 3000 && npm run sync:env && npm run build -w @nwrma/shared && npm run build -w web && npm run build -w server && concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run start -w server" "npm run start -w web"
scripts.start:api: npm run prisma:migrate -w server && npm run start -w server
